title: SerializedAssetRef
description: Serialized reference to a loaded asset (e.g. a Texture). Stores the loader **source key** the asset was loaded under, not the asset data itself. The contract is that referenced assets are pre-loaded into the target Loader before Scene.deserialize runs.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Serialized reference to a loaded asset (e.g. a Texture).
Stores the loader **source key** the asset was loaded under, not the asset data itself. The contract is that referenced assets are pre-loaded into the target Loader before Scene.deserialize runs.

members.name: source
members.description: Loader alias/source the asset was originally loaded under.
